title: BeeProxy
description: A budget-friendly residential proxy provider offering rotating and sticky SOCKS5/HTTP proxies. Developed the modern web dashboard interface featuring interactive country-level geo-targeting, bandwidth usage statistics, and smooth checkout flows.

title: 9Proxy
description: An affordable and versatile residential proxy network for seamless global data collection, offering exceptional performance and reliability even when operating at a large scale.

title: Magic Eden Trust and Safety
description: Trust and safety platform experience for Magic Eden, delivering a clearer information architecture and dependable frontend implementation for policy and support content.

title: Magic Eden Content Hub
description: Content platform for crypto and NFT market updates, built with React and Next.js to support editorial workflows, performance, and scalable content presentation.

title: Mocaverse
description: Community-facing product for the Mocaverse ecosystem, built to support an engaging branded experience with interactive frontend flows.

title: Best Bean Best Cup
description: Coffee brand storefront designed to present a premium product story and convert visitors with a clearer product browsing and purchasing experience.

title: Open Campus ID
description: Learner identity platform built to support proof of education and reward-driven user journeys with a responsive React interface.

title: Okay Bears NFTs
description: NFT marketplace experience for the Okay Bears community, built with a strong focus on responsive layout, branded storytelling, and collectible browsing flows.

title: EVISU Official Online Store
description: Official EVISU e-commerce storefront focused on premium product presentation, responsive shopping flows, and custom frontend behavior for a polished retail experience.

title: Mothercare HK
description: E-commerce experience for Mothercare Hong Kong, supporting product discovery, parenting-focused merchandising, and a clean shopping journey across devices.

title: HomeandHome
description: React Native mobile app for project information, sales documents, and policy updates, built to make daily internal workflows easier to access on mobile.
